metadata.description: World-class AI plugins for every industry, every role, every business. Built by Aimersion AI — DFW Texas. From healthcare to construction, legal to automotive, knowledge work to marketing automation.

plugins.name: immigration-law-helper
plugins.description: Immigration law practice toolkit — case tracking, document checklists, client communications, form preparation, and country conditions research for asylum cases

plugins.name: insurance-agency-operator
plugins.description: Full-service agency management for independent insurance agents — coverage reviews, cross-selling, claims guidance, marketing campaigns, and client retention workflows

plugins.name: review-feedback-manager
plugins.description: Complete review and reputation management suite for small businesses — monitor reviews across platforms, respond with proven templates, analyze sentiment, solicit new reviews, and recover from reputation crises

plugins.name: criminal-defense-toolkit
plugins.description: Criminal defense practice toolkit — case element analysis, discovery management, motion drafting, client communications, and sentencing mitigation

plugins.name: chiropractic-practice-builder
plugins.description: Complete practice growth toolkit for chiropractors — reactivate patients, communicate care plans, generate reviews, create educational content, and build referral programs

plugins.name: email-marketing-autopilot
plugins.description: Professional email marketing plugin: build drip sequences with proven timing, write newsletters that drive clicks, optimize subject lines with data-backed formulas, segment audiences by business type, analyze campaigns against real benchmarks, and diagnose deliverability issues. Built for marketers managing real subscriber lists.

plugins.name: inventory-pricing-optimizer
plugins.description: End-to-end inventory and pricing optimization for small businesses — demand forecasting, reorder point calculations, ABC analysis, competitive pricing frameworks, and seasonal adjustment strategies to eliminate stockouts and overstock

plugins.name: roofing-company-operator
plugins.description: Run a roofing contracting business — storm response, estimates, crew dispatch, warranty tracking, and lead generation

plugins.name: competitive-intel-monitor
plugins.description: Enterprise-grade competitive intelligence platform — battlecard creation, win/loss analysis, pricing intelligence, market trend monitoring, and strategic competitor research. Built for product marketers, CI professionals, and sales leaders who need actionable intel, not noise.

plugins.name: medical-device-sales-rep
plugins.description: Sales enablement toolkit for medical device representatives — plan territories, prepare for surgical cases, track competitors, manage surgeon relationships, and summarize clinical evidence

plugins.name: veterinary-practice-manager
plugins.description: Practice management toolkit for veterinary clinics — client communications, inventory tracking, wellness plans, social content, and staff training materials

plugins.name: supply-chain-manager
plugins.description: Complete supply chain and procurement toolkit — vendor evaluation, demand forecasting, logistics optimization, risk monitoring, and total cost analysis

plugins.name: auto-detailing-business
plugins.description: Complete business toolkit for auto detailing businesses: service packages, booking optimization, customer retention, social content, and fleet account management

plugins.name: customer-support-autopilot
plugins.description: End-to-end customer support automation: triage tickets, draft responses, write KB articles, package escalations, and monitor satisfaction trends

plugins.name: auto-dealership-operator
plugins.description: Complete dealership management toolkit: inventory analytics, lead nurturing, BDC operations, service retention, and marketing planning for car dealership managers and owners

plugins.name: general-contractor-operator
plugins.description: Run residential and commercial construction projects end-to-end — estimates, scheduling, change orders, safety compliance, and client communication

plugins.name: wedding-planner-assistant
plugins.description: Complete wedding planning toolkit for planners and event coordinators — timelines, vendor management, budgets, client communications, and day-of coordination

plugins.name: shopify-store-optimizer
plugins.description: Complete Shopify store optimization suite — product page copywriting, conversion rate optimization, email flow automation, collection merchandising, seasonal promotions, and speed optimization. Built from real merchant pain points and proven CRO frameworks.

plugins.name: landscaping-business-operator
plugins.description: Run a landscaping and lawn care company — route optimization, seasonal planning, estimates, customer retention, and content marketing

plugins.name: seo-content-machine
plugins.description: Professional SEO content toolkit — keyword research with SERP-validated methodology, content briefs writers actually use, on-page audits with schema markup and Core Web Vitals, competitive gap analysis, content decay detection, featured snippet optimization, and editorial calendar planning. Covers informational, e-commerce, local, and programmatic SEO.

plugins.name: tutoring-business-operator
plugins.description: Complete business toolkit for tutoring companies and independent tutors — assessments, progress reports, marketing, scheduling, and differentiated instruction

plugins.name: college-admissions-counselor

plugins.name: cybersecurity-consultant
plugins.description: Complete toolkit for cybersecurity professionals and consultants — NIST CSF risk assessments, incident response playbooks, compliance mapping (SOC 2, ISO 27001, CMMC), security awareness training, and professional security report writing

plugins.name: hr-hiring-assistant
plugins.description: The HR hiring assistant built for growing teams (20-200 employees) who hire without a dedicated recruiter. Write job descriptions that actually attract candidates, run structured interviews with real scorecards, manage offers and counteroffers, onboard by department, and stay compliant with DEI and remote hiring best practices. Works standalone or supercharged with your ATS, HRIS, and calendar.

plugins.description: Sophisticated wealth management toolkit for advisors and private bankers — portfolio reporting, estate planning, tax strategy, client communications, and compliance tracking

plugins.description: Operations toolkit for independent pharmacy owners — inventory optimization, patient adherence programs, marketing campaigns, compliance tracking, and clinical services development

plugins.name: product-launch-planner
plugins.description: End-to-end product launch planning suite — timeline generation, pricing strategy, audience building, content calendars, launch readiness audits, and post-launch analysis. Built on real launch data: 95% of launches fail, this plugin helps you be in the 5%.

plugins.name: franchise-operator
plugins.description: Comprehensive plugin for multi-unit franchise owners and operators. Manage unit performance benchmarking, brand compliance audits, staff training and development, local marketing execution, and financial analysis across your franchise portfolio.

plugins.description: Complete practice management toolkit for solo practitioners and small law firms — client intake, billing, case management, ethical marketing, and document drafting

plugins.name: home-health-agency-operator
plugins.description: Operations toolkit for home health agency owners — schedule caregivers, manage Medicare compliance, recruit staff, communicate with families, and track quality outcomes

plugins.name: hotel-operations-manager
plugins.description: Comprehensive hotel operations toolkit for GMs and operations managers — revenue optimization, guest communications, staff coordination, marketing planning, and quality auditing

plugins.name: painting-contractor-helper
plugins.description: Run a residential and commercial painting company — estimates, color consulting, crew scheduling, customer experience, and commercial proposals

plugins.name: influencer-affiliate-manager
plugins.description: End-to-end influencer and affiliate marketing management: creator vetting with fraud detection, rate card evaluation, FTC-compliant contract generation, campaign tracking with ROI attribution, and affiliate program design with tiered commissions.

plugins.name: bio-research
plugins.description: Connect to preclinical research tools and databases (literature search, genomics analysis, target prioritization) to accelerate early-stage life sciences R&D

plugins.name: customer-support
plugins.description: Triage tickets, draft responses, escalate issues, and build your knowledge base. Research customer context and turn resolved issues into self-service content.

plugins.name: data
plugins.description: Write SQL, explore datasets, and generate insights faster. Build visualizations and dashboards, and turn raw data into clear stories for stakeholders.

plugins.name: design
plugins.description: Accelerate design workflows — critique, design system management, UX writing, accessibility audits, research synthesis, and dev handoff. From exploration to pixel-perfect specs.

plugins.name: engineering
plugins.description: Streamline engineering workflows — standups, code review, architecture decisions, incident response, and technical documentation. Works with your existing tools or standalone.

plugins.name: enterprise-search
plugins.description: Search across all of your company's tools in one place. Find anything across email, chat, documents, and wikis without switching between apps.

plugins.name: finance
plugins.description: Streamline finance and accounting workflows, from journal entries and reconciliation to financial statements and variance analysis. Speed up audit prep, month-end close, and keeping your books clean.

plugins.name: human-resources
plugins.description: Streamline people operations — recruiting, onboarding, performance reviews, compensation analysis, and policy guidance. Maintain compliance and keep your team running smoothly.

plugins.name: legal
plugins.description: Speed up contract review, NDA triage, and compliance workflows for in-house legal teams. Draft legal briefs, organize precedent research, and manage institutional knowledge.

plugins.name: marketing
plugins.description: Create content, plan campaigns, and analyze performance across marketing channels. Maintain brand voice consistency, track competitors, and report on what's working.

plugins.name: operations
plugins.description: Optimize business operations — vendor management, process documentation, change management, capacity planning, and compliance tracking. Keep your organization running efficiently.

plugins.name: product-management
plugins.description: Write feature specs, plan roadmaps, and synthesize user research faster. Keep stakeholders updated and stay ahead of the competitive landscape.

plugins.name: productivity
plugins.description: Manage tasks, plan your day, and build up memory of important context about your work. Syncs with your calendar, email, and chat to keep everything organized and on track.

plugins.name: sales
plugins.description: Prospect, craft outreach, and build deal strategy faster. Prep for calls, manage your pipeline, and write personalized messaging that moves deals forward.

plugins.name: job-seeker-autopilot
plugins.description: Full-stack autonomous job search engine — find jobs, research companies, tailor resumes, write cover letters, submit applications at scale, send outreach, track pipeline, and prep for interviews.
